<!-- d20pfsrd:rewritten -->
# Faith Singer

Contents

- Faithful
- Devout Spell Knowledge (Su)

Faith singers show their faith in their deity with songs or other appropriate performances.

#### Faithful

Like a cleric, a faith singer must worship a deity, and his alignment must be within one step of his deity’s alignment.

#### Devout Spell Knowledge (Su)

At 2nd level, a faith singer can select one domain from among those belonging to his deity. Once per day as a spell-like ability using his bard level as his caster level, he can cast the 1st-level domain spell while giving a bardic performance.

At 6th level, and every 4 bard levels thereafter, he can similarly cast the next-higher domain spell as a spell-like ability (to a maximum of the 5th-level domain spell at bard
